title: Fix negative index boundary check in circular buffer
description: The circular buffer's get method was not handling negative indices correctly, causing an IndexError when the buffer was partially filled and a negative index exceeded the current size.
diff:
diff --git a/structures/circular_buffer.py b/structures/circular_buffer.py
index 8f9a0b1..c2d3e4f 100644
--- a/structures/circular_buffer.py
+++ b/structures/circular_buffer.py
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ class CircularBuffer:
 
     def get(self, index: int) -> Any:
         '''Get item at index, supporting negative indexing.'''
-        if abs(index) > self._capacity:
+        if abs(index) > len(self._buffer):
             raise IndexError(f"Index {index} out of range for buffer of size {len(self._buffer)}")
         return self._buffer[index % len(self._buffer)]
comments: jane: Correct — should check against current size, not capacity. Approve.
author: karl
